targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time AS "time",
  ROUND(pf_efficiency::numeric, 2) as guc_faktoru,
  ROUND(lagging_pf::numeric, 2) as gec_pf
FROM main_data.processed_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND shift IN (${shift:sqlstring})
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  hour::text as saat,
  ROUND(AVG(usage_kwh)::numeric, 2) as ort_tuketim
FROM main_data.processed_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY hour
ORDER BY hour

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  ROUND(usage_ma_1h::numeric, 2) as "1 Saatlik MA",
  ROUND(usage_ma_4h::numeric, 2) as "4 Saatlik MA"
FROM main_data.processed_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND shift IN (${shift:sqlstring})
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  shift as vardiya,
  ROUND(AVG(usage_kwh)::numeric, 2) as ort_tuketim
FROM main_data.processed_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY shift
ORDER BY ort_tuketim DESC

SELECT ROUND(AVG(usage_kwh)::numeric, 2) as ort_tuketim
FROM main_data.processed_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND shift IN (${shift:sqlstring})

SELECT ROUND(AVG(pf_efficiency)::numeric, 1) as pf_ort
FROM main_data.processed_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND shift IN (${shift:sqlstring})

SELECT ROUND(MAX(usage_kwh)::numeric, 2) as pik_tuketim
FROM main_data.processed_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND shift IN (${shift:sqlstring})

SELECT ROUND(
  AVG(CASE WHEN low_pf_flag THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) * 100
  ::numeric, 1) as dusuk_pf_orani
FROM main_data.processed_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
